creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Helge Oldach from comment #2)
Hmm, the periodic(8) and periodic.conf(5) files are out of sync.  This looks like a bug in commit e5d7100c09e03.  I don't really understand the motivation for that commit; there is already a way to provide local settings (periodic.conf.local) and we don't support /usr/local/etc/rc.conf.
